=== info.txt
===================
===================
===================
BOB DYLAN 
Copenhagen 2002

Monday April 8
Copenhagen, Denmark
Forum

Crystal Cat Records  619-620

Copenhagen 2002 Silver > CD-r > eac secure/offset > wav > flac 8 
 
  	
  01. Intro
  02. Hallelujah, I'm Ready To Go(acoustic)
  03. The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic) (Bob on harp)
  04. It's Alright, Ma (I'm Only Bleeding) (acoustic)
  05. Love Minus Zero/No Limit (acoustic) (Bob on harp)
  06. Solid Rock
  07. Moonlight
  08. Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again (Larry on acoustic guitar)
  09. Sugar Baby
  10. Masters Of War (acoustic)
  11. One Too Many Mornings (acoustic) (Bob on harp)
  12. Outro

  Disc Two
  01. Tangled Up In Blue (acoustic) (Bob on harp)
  02. Summer Days (Tony on standup bass)
  03. Positively 4th Street
  04. Cold Irons Bound
  05. Leopard-Skin Pill-Box Hat

      (encore)
  06. Not Fade Away
  07. Like A Rolling Stone
  08. I Shall Be Released(acoustic)
  09. Honest With Me
  10. Blowin' In The Wind (acoustic) (Bob on harp)
  11. Outro
